hypotheses.summary: At anchor4, add a small legal z-family closed pair before the 4→5→6 front-half z corridor completes, then hand off to the untouched late relay core. This is earlier than the anchor5 far-z family and does not reuse the anchor8 / anchor9 / anchor10-11 neighborhoods.

At anchor4, open the real inner axis from beta=+90 to mixed beta and visit the two legal diagonal outer axes inside one exact-return butterfly before resuming the base path. This is a front-half mixed-beta family, distinct from the tested anchor9 butterfly basin.
Mirror-style early x-boundary control around anchor2/3. Kept listed but not spent because it is less mechanistically coupled to the successful late relay backbone than H1/H2.
A coupled two-anchor front-half corridor chain across anchors4 and5. Held back until H1/H2 show isolated value, to avoid reopening the anchor5 basin without evidence.

tested_hypotheses.summary: At anchor4, add a small legal z-family closed pair before the 4→5→6 front-half z corridor completes, then hand off to the untouched late relay core. This is earlier than the anchor5 far-z family and does not reuse the anchor8 / anchor9 / anchor10-11 neighborhoods.

At anchor4, open the real inner axis from beta=+90 to mixed beta and visit the two legal diagonal outer axes inside one exact-return butterfly before resuming the base path. This is a front-half mixed-beta family, distinct from the tested anchor9 butterfly basin.

kf36_recheck.reason: Not triggered because the best landing frontzseed_l4_neg6_plus_relaymax_unified_l9y2p5 = 9.575 / 0.789 / 99.634 still sits too far from both `zseed_l5_neg6_plus_relaymax_unified_l9y2p5` and `entryrelay_l8x1_l9y1_unifiedcore` to count as genuinely competitive.

bottom_line.scientific_conclusion: This batch did probe genuinely new front-half structure beyond the already-pruned basins: an anchor4 front-z precursor seed family and an anchor4 mixed-beta diagonal butterfly family. The best landed point was `frontzseed_l4_neg6_plus_relaymax_unified_l9y2p5` = 9.575 / 0.789 / 99.634. Relative to `zseed_l5_neg6_plus_relaymax_unified_l9y2p5` it moved by Δmean -0.232 and Δmax -0.058; relative to `entryrelay_l8x1_l9y1_unifiedcore` it moved by Δmean +0.040 and Δmax -0.060. So this post-anchor5 hidden-family batch did not uncover a stronger direction: the tested anchor4 front-half families remain clearly behind the current anchor5 mainline and the entry-conditioned max frontier.
